title: React Hooks
content: Learn useState, useEffect, useContext, and useReducer with practical examples.Build a small project to understand when each hook should be used in real applications.

title: MongoDB CRUD
content: Practice Create, Read, Update, and Delete operations using Mongoose.Also learn validation,schema design, and error handling.

title: JWT Authentication
content: Implement user registration,login,password hashing wiht bcrypt,JWT token generation, protected routes, and logout functionality.

title: Express Routing
content: Organize APIs using Express Router. Create separate route files,middleware,controllers,and reusable authentication logic.

title: Tailwind CSS
content: Create responsive layouts using Flexbox, Grid.Practice spacing,typography, transitions, hover effects, and reusable UI components.

title: JavaScript Array Methods
content: Revise map(), filter(), find(), reduce(), and forEach(). Solve five coding questions using each method.

title: Git Commands
content: Practice git init, add, commit, push, pull, branch, checkout, merge and resolve merge conflicts.Learn how to manage repositories using GitHub.

title: REST API
content: Understand GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, and DELETE methods.Learn request and response objects, status codes, routing, middleware, and API testing using Postman.After checking every API, i finally found the issue. The loginroute was working, but the JWT token wasn't being sent correctly. A small mistake, but it took hours to notice

title: Project Ideas
content: Build a Notes App, Weather App, Currency Converter, and Task Manager,Express tracker, and E-commerce website to strengthen your MERN Stack skills.

title: Interview Preparation
content: Revise JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB,SQL,HTML,CSS and common coding interview questions wiht hands-on practice every day.
